title: Chimichurri Prawn Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring succulent prawns tossed in a dense and tangy chimichurri sauce, served in a bowl.

ingredients.name: mustard oil
ingredients.notes: for a dense and tangy flavor

instructions: 1. Preheat the grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Peel and de-vein the prawns, leaving the tails intact.
3. Season the prawns with salt, pepper, and dried oregano.
4. Grill the prawns for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, combine parsley, garlic, red pepper flakes, red wine vinegar, and mustard oil in a bowl.
6. Toss the grilled prawns in the chimichurri sauce until well-coated.
7. Serve the prawn bowl immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
